ata importer's Corporate Privacy Policy:

Appendix 3 - Security Measures   
 
 1. All parties are obliged to clarify the organizational, administrative, technical, and security measures that will be applied to the transferred Per
evidence.clean_text: (i) Controlling access to buildings and facilities (physical), (ii) IT system access control (by default), (iii) Personal Data access control, (iv) Personal Data disclosure control, (v) Input Control, (vi) Functionality Control, (vii) Personal Data accessibility control, (viii) Personal Data segregation control
